investors: Piper Serica | Shibam Das | Sumit Chhazed
summary: Ubiqedge raised Rs 10 crore in a seed round led by Piper Serica, with participation from Atomberg CEO Shibam Das and Sumit Chhazed, to enhance its AIoT platform for industrial infrastructure.

investors: Anthill Ventures | Avinya Ventures | Finvolve | Founder’s Avenue | India Accelerator | Inflection Point Ventures | LVX | Shivakumar Ganesan | Vivek Sinha
summary: Ctruh, a deep‑tech startup building a browser‑native 3D/XR platform, raised $2.5 million in a seed round co‑led by Inflection Point Ventures and Avinya Ventures.
Prithu, a climate technology startup focused on nature-based carbon removal, raised Rs 10 crore in a seed round led by Transition VC to expand farmer networks and blockchain-powered MRV systems.

investors: Blume Ventures | Hardik Pandya | Jasprit Bumrah | MIXI | MS Dhoni | Ravindra Jadeja | Sai Sudharsan | Shreyas Iyer | Tilak Varma | Times Internet | V3 Ventures
summary: LightFury Games raised $11 million in a pre-Series A round from investors including Blume, V3 Ventures, MIXI, Times Internet and several Indian cricketers. The funds will be used to complete development of its AAA mobile cricket game eCricket.

investors: Blume Ventures | CRED | Peak XV Partners
summary: Consumer AI startup Curious Digital (operating as M) raised Rs 102 crore (~$12.3 million) in a Series Seed round led by Peak XV Partners with participation from Blume Ventures and CRED.
Healthcare automation startup Coral raised $12.5 million in a seed round from Z47 and Lightspeed Venture Partners.

investors: InfoEdge Ventures | Kae Capital | Susquehanna Venture Capital
summary: GobbleCube, an AI-driven brand analytics platform, raised $15 million in a Series A round backed by Susquehanna Venture Capital.

TraqCheck, an HR tech startup now based in London, raised $8 million in a Series A round led by IvyCap Ventures with participation from IIFL Fintech Fund to expand its AI-driven background screening and sourcing agents in Europe.

Pluckk, a digital-first fresh food and clean-label FMCG brand, raised Rs 100 crore in a Series A1 round led by Euro Gulf Investment to expand offline retail, international markets, and AI-driven supply chain capabilities.
IndiGo Ventures Fund invested about Rs 10 crore in Sarla Aviation, an eVTOL startup, to support its operating and expansion needs.

investors: BNP Paribas | Bandhan | Citigroup | Goldman Sachs | HDFC MF | ICICI Prudential | Quant MF | Sundaram MF | Tata Banking & Financial Services | WhiteOak Capital
summary: Kissht raised Rs 278 crore from 22 anchor investors, including domestic mutual funds and global institutions, ahead of its IPO.

investors: A.P. Moller Holding | Advent International | Dragon Funds | Hornbill Capital | Motilal Oswal Alternates | Premji Invest | WhiteOak Capital
summary: Fintech startup KreditBee raised $280 million in a funding round involving multiple investors.

ITI Growth Opportunities Fund | Merisis Wealth Trust | PROMAFT Partners | V3 Ventures | family offices
summary: The Hosteller raised Rs 150 crore (approximately $16 million) from a group of investors including PROMAFT Partners and V3 Ventures.
Smartworks reported Q4 FY26 revenue of Rs 520 crore, crossing Rs 500 crore and achieving profitability.
Go Digit General Insurance reported a 28% YoY profit increase to Rs 149 crore in Q4 FY26, with flat revenue and details on premiums and expenses.
Unicommerce, a Gurugram-based e‑commerce enablement SaaS platform, reported Q4 FY26 revenue of Rs 52.8 crore and profit of Rs 3.4 crore, with a market cap of about $133 million.
Eternal, a{foodtech and quick commerce platform}, reported a 4.5X profit increase to Rs 174 crore in Q4 FY26, with revenue growth driven by its Blinkit arm.
